raw.notes: Translucent overlay. Added manually because the student Figma file had no effect styles. Seen in live DOM as modal backdrops / section dividers.
Subtle black overlay at 10% alpha. Added manually. Seen in live DOM as soft shadows / card surfaces.
White at 80% alpha. Used for overlays and disabled states. System-gap discovered in 2026-04-16 drift report.
Lavender at ~70% alpha. Used as card surface color. System-gap discovered in 2026-04-16 drift report.
Body regular — Nunito 16px/400. Confirmed system gap, not candidate: canonical scale had 16/500, 16/600, 16/700, 16/800 but not plain body regular. Added 2026-04-16 from drift report.

Active state background for the feed tab toggle (togglebutton_activePaid). Identified via authenticated DOM inspection 2026-04-16. Previously flagged as unknown color; reclassified as intentional UI state color.
Pill-shape border radius used by the feed tab toggle. Not in the frequency-ranked radius canonicals. Identified via authenticated DOM inspection 2026-04-16.
White at 20% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.
White at 40% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.
White at 72% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.
Lavender surface at 50% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.
Mist gray surface at 40% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.
Near-black overlay at 10% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.
Dark gray overlay at 10% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.
Slate overlay at 28% alpha — matches canonical slate #222a33. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.
Purple overlay at 10% alpha. System-gap from 2026-04-16 drift report.
